name: The Green Dragon Tavern — Public Room
description: The public room of the Green Dragon is half-full despite the hour, loud with ordinary conversation that seems just slightly too ordinary. Thomas Wren moves behind the bar with the practiced ease of a man who never stops watching the door.
atmosphericDetails: The sign above the bar — a green dragon on a black field — is smoke-darkened and old.
Three men at a corner table are playing cards with the focused silence of men who are not thinking about cards.
The back room door is closed; a line of light shows under it.
